name: eBOOK Initiative Japan Co.,Ltd.
summary: eBOOK Initiative Japan Co.,Ltd. offers e-book sales services in Japan and internationally. The company engages in the provision of content digitization and distribution services; planning, development, and production of electronic content; editing and publishing of books and magazines; and paper book online sales services business. It operates ebookJapan, an e-book sales service; and bookfan, an online book sales service. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
